hero.description: Presidency University offers a broad portfolio of three- and four-year undergraduate programmes across ten Schools, approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and Government of India.

about.title: About the Programme
about.content: Presidency University offers a broad portfolio of three- and four-year undergraduate programmes across ten Schools, all approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and the relevant statutory bodies of the Government of India. Every programme combines academic rigour with industry exposure, live projects, and structured pathways into postgraduate study at Presidency or at partner universities abroad through the 3+1+1 dual-qualification route. All programmes are open to international students.
about.note: Entry requirements, intakes, and fees vary by programme — contact the Office of International Affairs (OIA) for a personalised consultation.

schools.name: Presidency School of Computer Science and Engineering
programs: B.Tech CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning)
B.Tech Computer Science and Technology (Big Data)
B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science

schools.name: Presidency School of Media Studies
programs: BA JMC (Digital Marketing and Advertising / PR and Corporate Communication)
BA JMC (Film, Television and Digital Production)
BA JMC (Immersive Media, AR/VR and Interactive Storytelling)
BA JMC (Digital Storytelling and Content Creation)

schools.name: Presidency School of Liberal Arts and Sciences
programs: BA (Performing Arts — Classical Dance, Psychology / English)
BA (Performing Arts — Western Music Instrumental, English / Psychology)

schools.name: Presidency School of Allied Health Sciences
